title: 6 Pack Reusable Sticker Book for Kids 2 3 4 Year Olds, 300+ 3D Puffy Sticker Books for Toddlers, Stickers Activity Pack Learning Toy Birthday Gifts for Boys Girls
features: Discover 6 Fun Themes and Reusable Puffy Sticker Books: This reusable sticker book set includes 6 exciting themes—Space, Wild Animal, Vehicle, Ocean, and Dinosaurs—each paired with a reusable sticker sheet(300+ 3D puffy stickers in total). Kids can explore different scenes and stories, making every playtime fresh and engaging.

Easy Peel-and-Stick for Reusable Fun: These reusable sticker books use a special adhesive that allows kids to peel and re-stick the stickers multiple times without losing stickiness. It ensures hours of interactive fun and creativity for toddlers aged 2-6.

Convenient Handle for Travel and Playtime: Each reusable sticker book features a handy carry handle, making it perfect for travel, car rides, and flights. Made of waterproof materials with soft, rounded corners for safety. Kids can easily bring these sticker books along and enjoy quiet play anywhere.

DIY Scenes for Creative Learning and Fun: These reusable sticker books encourage kids to build scenes and explore various themes, promoting creative thinking through hands-on play. Parents and Children can enjoy building imaginative worlds anytime to enhance parent-children relationship.

Perfect Gift for Kids Ages 2-6: These reusable sticker activity books are a wonderful addition to any home, preschool, or classroom. They’re also a perfect gift choice for birthdays and holidays, delighting children everywhere.
Children under 3 years old need to be accompanied by an adult when playing.
